layout.subtitle: Cross-tenant operations, audit, and impersonation tooling. Access is logged.

login.title: Back-office sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your platform-operator credentials.
login.errorGeneric: Sign in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
login.disclaimer: This area is for platform operators. Access attempts are recorded.

mfaNotEnrolled.title: Two-factor enrollment required
mfaNotEnrolled.body: Two-factor authentication is enforced for {{email}} but no enrollment exists yet. Run the CLI command below on the server to enroll, then return here to sign in.

challenge.title: Two-factor verification
challenge.subtitle: Enter the verification code for {{email}}.
challenge.totpHint: Open your authenticator app and copy the 6-digit code.
challenge.backupHint: Use one of the single-use backup codes you saved when you enrolled.
challenge.error: The code was rejected. Try again or use a backup code.

session.expired: Your back-office session has expired. Please sign in again.
session.authRequired: Sign in to the back-office plane to continue.

me.title: Operator profile
me.subtitle: Your back-office identity and session controls.
